content.en:
In particular, the Primordial Realm Flower can allow the Patriarch to resurrect the Ninefold to the Dao Realm, offsetting most of the backlash, which is very exaggerated.

The strength of the patriarch is terrifying, he can resurrect the Ninefold to the Dao Realm, but the cost is too great, and even the weaker Patriarch can fall, and only the top patriarch dares to resurrect the Ninefold to the Dao Realm.

But the price is too great, and no top veteran is willing to do this, unless it is his own relatives.

Ye Tian is in the human realm, and he can also resurrect weaker creatures, but he also has to pay a little price.

For example, if some geniuses of mankind fall, they will also be resurrected, but it also depends on whether it is really worth resurrecting.

Resurrecting the Ninefold to the Dao Realm, he can't do it, if he dares to do so, he will die in an instant.

"The Primordial Flower is a good thing, and the other two are also good things!"

Ye Tian was ready to enter the Primordial Void and give it a try.

If you find any of these three resources, you will be a big profit!

Of course, what he wanted to find most was the primordial dark dragon liquid, and if he found it, he could improve his cultivation.

After the Longyan Ancient Emperor Elder told Ye Tian the location of the Primordial Void, he went to the Primordial Void.

......

"It's a bit far away, it's taken so long to get to the primordial void. "

Ye Tian came to the entrance of the primordial void and muttered.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian passed through the entrance of the Primordial Void and entered the Primordial Void.

The primordial void, an empty space.

"This is the Primordial Void, it doesn't seem to be anything special!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he began to look for resources.

After a while.

"Nothing, it's too boring, no wonder the Ancient Emperor of Longyan doesn't want to come here to look for resources, it's all luck!" Ye Tian was a little helpless.

Gradually, the long years passed.

If it weren't for the fact that he had multiple duplicate bodies that didn't affect his cultivation, he would have gone out a long time ago.

As the Elder of the Longyan Ancient Emperor said, the primordial void, time and space are infinitely extended, and the area here is too large.

this day.

Ye Tian sensed a special creature in the primordial void.

It was a mouse-like creature, constantly jumping in the time and space of the primordial void, and when he sensed it, the other party jumped away, so fast that even he couldn't catch up.

【Primordial Treasure Rat】

Ye Tian saw the other party's name through the copying talent.

......

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian contacted the Ancient Emperor of Longyan.

"Elder Longyan, do you know the Primordial Treasure Rat?"

Ye Tian asked casually.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan nodded: "I know, the primordial treasure rat is the darling of the primordial void time and space, and it can jump between time and space at will, and the speed is incomparably fast, and its cultivation is comparable to that of ordinary legends to the Dao realm, and its combat effectiveness is not strong, but it can escape." Moreover, it is a real treasure rat and can easily find good things. It's just that we can't control it, and we can't track it. "

"Could it be that it can find treasures such as Primordial Realm Flowers?" Ye Tian was surprised.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan smiled and said, "If you spend more time, you can still find it." It is said that there was a top patriarch who was good at tracking, so he was idle and bored, so he went to track the primordial treasure rat, and found some resources. But even if the primordial treasure rats can be found, they don't bother to look for them, after all, they have no desire to cultivate, and they have little interest in improving their strength. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

He was secretly excited, he could completely copy the body of the Primordial Treasure Rat, and then look for resources in the Primordial Void as the Primordial Treasure Rat!

In this way, he would have the hope of finding a large amount of Primordial Dragon Liquid and quickly improving his cultivation.

......

Primordial Void.

Ye Tian began to condense the copy body of the primordial treasure rat, and soon the copy body of the primordial treasure rat was condensed.

Then.

His primordial treasure rat copy body, it seems to have a special sense, as if a huge area is in his perception, in this special perception, nothing hidden can hide from him, he can even detect the value of these items and so on.

"Sure enough, it's the treasure hunting ability of the primordial treasure rat!"

Ye Tian began to hunt for treasure.

Swish!

He space-jumped, and came to another area.

However, most of the areas of the Primordial Void don't have anything good, so you'll have to be patient to find treasures.

Whew!!!!

Ye Tian kept shuttling through time and space, almost staying in an area for a moment, if there was really something good, he would sense it directly, and he didn't need to look for it slowly.

After a long time.

"Hey, I sensed it!"

Ye Tian was attracted by a treasure.

You must know that the items that can attract the original treasure are all good things, and ordinary items cannot attract the original treasure rat at all.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over.

This is a ruined continent, full of traces of ruins, but in the depths of the fragments of this ruined continent, a treasure has been born.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and the second sequence of supreme rules shattered this piece of fragmented continent and took out a treasure hidden inside.

"It's ...... Primordial dust!"

Ye Tian sensed the aura of the Second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, this was a second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, how valuable it was.

It's just that the quality of this original dust gold is not good, it is a low-quality original dust gold.

"This quality of primordial dust gold, once refined, the foundation is destroyed, the body will gradually collapse, only an incomparably rare treasure can keep the body from collapsing, but if you want to cultivate, you can't do it, you can only survive!" Ye Tian said darkly.

It is precisely because the side effects are so big that there is no top legend to the Dao realm to come here and always look for primordial dust gold.

"In the infinite years, a total of six high-quality primordial dust gold have been unearthed, and the probability ratio is too low!"

"Still, this treasure will help me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He put away this second-order supreme Dao rule item low-quality primordial dust, if there was enough of this primordial dust, his second-order supreme Dao rule realm would also improve rapidly!

"Finding a low-quality second-order supreme rule item is a good start!"

Ye Tian continued to use the Primordial Treasure Rat to find resources.

In the blink of an eye, a relatively long period of time has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian found something good again, this time it was not the primordial dust gold of the second sequence of supreme rules items, but the primordial dark dragon liquid.

In the midst of nothingness.

A drop of primordial dark dragon liquid condensed out in a sea and was sensed by Ye Tian.

"Close!"

This drop of primordial dragon liquid is in hand.

"Yes, with the original treasure rat replica body, I'm afraid I won't be able to find resources????"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
